summary: Completed comprehensive frontend navigation testing for Electrogrupo website restructuring. All brand pages, service pages, navigation links, and cross-linking functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage brand logos (IMBIL, Western, CONSILOS, OuroPro) clickable navigation to brand pages
Western brand page loads with hero, about, services, CTA and links to /riego-por-pivot
CONSILOS brand page loads with hero, about, services, CTA and links to /silos
OuroPro brand page loads with hero, about, services, CTA and links to /fertirrigacion
IMBIL brand page loads with hero, about, services, CTA and links to /sistema-de-bombeo
Silos service page loads with CONSILOS badge and 'Ver empresa' link to /marca/consilos
Sistema de Bombeo service page loads with IMBIL badge and 'Ver empresa' link to /marca/imbil
Fertirrigación service page loads with OuroPro badge and 'Ver empresa' link to /marca/ouropro
Riego por Pivot page has Western badge and 'Ver empresa' link to /marca/western
Footer 'Nuestras marcas' links navigate correctly to all brand pages
Footer 'Soluciones' links navigate correctly to all service pages
Nav dropdown 'Irrigación' has working links: Riego por Pivot, Sistemas de Bombeo, Fertirrigación
Nav dropdown 'Pos Cosecha' has working Silos link
Homepage Solutions section cards navigate correctly to brand pages
